title: About Me
text:
I’m a fourth-year Business Studies International student at Dublin City University, specialising in the Japanese language and data analytics. I’m particularly interested in utilising data analytics to examine public policy and investment, which I have approached in some of my projects.



Languages: English (Native), Japanese (B2), Mandarin (A2)
Programming Languages: Python, CSS, SQL, HTML
Software: Power BI, GitHub, Microsoft Office





Japanese Language Proficiency Test N3 (日本語能力試験3級)
Recipient of the Heiwa-Nakajima Foundation (平和中島財団) Scholarship 2024/2025

title: Robert Mullins
text:
I’m a Final Year International Business student at Dublin City University. Here, you can find a collection of my skills, academic projects and experiences. Do feel free to reach out to me on Linkedin or by email if you have any questions!
You can find out more about me here.
Alternatively, feel free to take a look at my projects here.
